payload.text:
ℹ️ How Virtual Numbers works

• Tap 🌍 Browse to pick a country and number
• Pay once — the number is yours for a single verification
• You'll receive the number right here in chat
• Optionally list it publicly for others to see

Refund policy
If a number doesn't work for your verification, contact @support within 24 hours for a full refund.

Need help? Tap /start to go back to the menu.

name: Help menu button shows help text
